Localization.Description: Disabling PostgreSQL database security parameters reduces the security level of the data stored

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Database user {subject.application.account.name} disabled database event logging on host {event_src.host}
Database user {subject.application.account.name} disabled event logging of database {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
Database user {subject.application.account.name} disabled traffic encryption between the client and the database server on host {event_src.host}
Database user {subject.application.account.name} relaxed the password encryption policy on host {event_src.host}
Database user {subject.application.account.name} disabled one of the security parameters on host {event_src.host}
Database user {subject.application.account.name} disabled Row Security Policies for table {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
